title: Toasted
description: Adds a toaster and toast to minecraft
body:
please do not upload this to any other site without Addie's permission ------------- [ ](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Funsupported%2Fforge_vector.svg&n=-1) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/toasted) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/amblekit) [](https://fabricmc.net/) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac87b58331af401c559133e1438798e88a55d6.png) -------------

Small Q&A!

### What does this add / do? - Adds the toaster ### Why ? - A. Why not! - B. So the toaster in stargate mod wouldnt have more features than needed :D. ### Will this mod be ported to forge or neoforge? - No. ### How do i make / use the toaster? - It is made like this: ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6aa57da3b8c4e45c833116115e60b7331607d71_0.webp) - You use it by `right-clicking` on the block with bread, this will give you toast. If you `right-click` again (but with toast this time) it will give you burnt toast. - You can also place it in water :) -------------

Required Mods!

- Requires AmbleKit (latest 1.20.1 version) -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/amblekit/versions) -------------

Credits

### Developers: - [Addi3_Astarr](https://addi3.github.io/index.html) (Lead Developer) ------------- -------------
